prompt: A cinematic sci-fi anime movie poster of a heavily armored cylindrical deep-sea submarine on a rocky ocean floor. The sub features a glowing cyan central viewport, a ring of smaller lights, two bright downward spotlights, and "{argument name="hull text" default="NEREIS-01"}" painted on its side. Behind it looms a {argument name="creature type" default="colossal bioluminescent anemone-like entity"} with radiating tentacles tipped with cyan lights. The dark teal abyss features glowing seabed flora. Top left text includes the Japanese title "{argument name="main title" default="深淵の地平線"}", the subtitle "{argument name="english subtitle" default="ABYSS HORIZON"}", and the tagline "{argument name="tagline" default="暗黒は、終わりじゃない。人類の新しい始まりだ。"}". Small technical footer text reads "INTERNATIONAL DEEP SEA TREATY ORGANIZATION" on the bottom left and "IDTO-AB-013300-ALPHA" on the bottom right. Highly detailed, dramatic lighting, industrial mecha design.

breakdown.creativeCore: Sci-Fi Deep Sea Submarine Poster：Generates a cinematic sci-fi poster of a deep-sea submarine encountering a giant bioluminescent creature, complete with titles and technical text.
breakdown.subject: 综合主体
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, anime, sci-fi]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: dramatic lighting]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
